---
title: "Untitled"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}

# 1. Get full paths to all CSVs in the "time" folder
soc6302 <- list.files(here("time/SOC6302"), pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
soc387  <- list.files(here("time/SOC387"), pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

# 2. Read and combine them into class data frames
df_stats <- soc6302 |>
  map_dfr(~ read_delim(.x, delim = ";", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
            mutate(class = "soc6302"))

df_policy <- soc387 |>
  map_dfr(~ read_delim(.x, delim = ";", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
            mutate(class = "soc387"))

df <- bind_rows(df_stats, df_policy)

```

Total logged hours spent per class

```{r}

df |>
  group_by(class) |>
  summarise(
    total_worked = sum(as.numeric(Worked), na.rm = TRUE),
    total_worked = seconds_to_period(total_worked),
    total_worked = sprintf("%02d:%02d",
                           hour(total_worked),
                           minute(total_worked))
  )

```


Split equally the time for multiple tasks

```{r}

df <- df |>
  # 1. Split Titles into a list-column of tasks
  mutate(
    task_list = str_split(Titles, "\\s*\\|\\s*")
  ) |>
  
  # 2. Count how many tasks per row
  mutate(
    n_tasks = lengths(task_list)
  ) |>
  
  # 3. Convert Worked (hms/difftime) → numeric seconds
  mutate(
    worked_seconds = as.numeric(Worked)
  ) |>
  
  # 4. Divide time equally across tasks
  mutate(
    seconds_per_task = worked_seconds / n_tasks
  ) |>
  
  # 5. Unnest so each task becomes its own row
  unnest(task_list) |>
  
  # 6. Clean up
  mutate(
    task = task_list,
    Worked_split = seconds_to_period(seconds_per_task)
  ) |>
  select(-task_list, -n_tasks, -worked_seconds, -seconds_per_task)
```


Estimate of time per class and task

```{r}

df_tasks <- df |>
  group_by(class, task) |>
  summarise(
    seconds = sum(as.numeric(Worked_split), na.rm = TRUE),
    total_worked = seconds_to_period(seconds),
    total_worked = sprintf("%02d:%02d",
                           hour(total_worked),
                           minute(total_worked))
  ) |>
  ungroup()


# make meaningful categories
df_tasks <- df_tasks |>
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      str_detect(task, regex("^Grade", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "grading",
      str_detect(task, regex("^Lecture", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "lectures",
      str_detect(task, regex("Milestone", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "milestones",
      str_detect(task, regex("final exam|mid-?term", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "exams",
      str_detect(task, regex("code-along", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "code-alongs",
      str_detect(task, regex("tutorial", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "tutorials",
      TRUE ~ "other"
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup()


```

## SOC6302

Fill in missing time estimates for each category 

```{r}

# Filter & convert Worked_split to seconds
df_6302 <- df_tasks |>
  filter(class == "soc6302")

# Define how many tasks each category should have
expected_counts <- tibble(
  category = c("lectures", "tutorials", "code-alongs", "milestones"),
  expected_n = c(9, 9, 9, 4)
)

# Count how many tasks you actually have per category
actual_counts <- df_6302 |>
  count(category, name = "actual_n")

# Compute average seconds per category (for filling missing rows)
category_avgs <- df_6302 |>
  group_by(category) |>
  summarise(avg_seconds = mean(seconds, na.rm = TRUE))

# Determine how many rows are missing per category
counts <- expected_counts |>
  left_join(actual_counts, by = "category") |>
  mutate(actual_n = replace_na(actual_n, 0)) |>
  left_join(category_avgs, by = "category") |>
  mutate(n_missing = expected_n - actual_n)

# Create filler rows for missing tasks
missing_rows <- counts |>
  filter(n_missing > 0) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    filler = list(
      tibble(
        category = category,
        task = paste(category, "placeholder"),
        seconds = rep(avg_seconds, n_missing)
      )
    )
  ) |>
  select(filler) |> 
  unnest(filler)



# Combine original + filler rows
df_filled <- bind_rows(
  df_6302 |> select(category, task, seconds),
  missing_rows
)


```


Compute average hours/minutes per category

```{r}

to_hm <- function(sec) {
  p <- seconds_to_period(sec)
  total_hours <- hour(p) + 24 * day(p)
  sprintf("%02d:%02d", total_hours, minute(p))
}

df_summary <- df_filled |>
  group_by(category) |>
  summarise(
    total_seconds = sum(seconds, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_seconds   = mean(seconds, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_hm      = to_hm(total_seconds),
    avg_hm        = to_hm(avg_seconds)
  ) |>
  filter(category != "exams" & category != "grading")

df_summary
```
